title: Go 1.26 Toolchain, Programs, Packages, and Evidence · Runtime Contract: Version Runtime Boundary
summary: A small operations team needs a reproducible status tool, but its source, package boundary, formatter, build, runtime, and release identity are unclear. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go version runtime boundary increment in a reproducible first-program and toolchain evidence record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate language version, toolchain version, runtime behavior, GOOS and GOARCH target, and browser-interpreter limitations.
Apply UTF-8 source, identifiers, keywords, tokens, semicolon insertion, comments, and formatting rules without relying on visual coincidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
